name: Farm Town Simulator
description:
Just a Farm Town simulator. Enjoy your farm life.

I made this because I love farm settings and how crazy they can get. Go wild, let the bot create the environment for you. Just provide minimum info like if the town is near the ocean, etc. If not just let the bot generate everything randomly for you and play along.

Tip: Use the chat memory for keeping the settings that you'd like the bot to remember once it generates it for you. Ex. Characters that you like, shops you like... etc.
I personally had a lot of fun when I played as a patissier or baker in the farm town. And also a barista.🥖🥐🥞🧁

Model Recommendations: Works fantastic with Deepseek V3 for comical situations. Use Gemini 3.0 for something more organized. Grok for something fluffy.
creator: poma63
